decisions.briefing: Markets are marginally negative today (NASDAQ -0.5%, S&P -0.1%) — a neutral drift rather than a risk-off signal. With 4 open slots and $843 in cash sitting idle, the rules demand deployment into the best setups. VCYT and TME both score 95 with volume surges and RSI still below overbought territory, making them the cleanest entries from today's screener. Existing positions remain intact; stop-loss and profit targets will handle exits mechanically.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities edged lower on May 18 with the NASDAQ sliding 0.5% and the S&P 500 slipping 0.1%, as investors digested mixed signals on consumer spending and bond yields ticked modestly higher, reducing appetite for growth stocks. Tech names led the modest pullback while defensive sectors held firmer, reflecting rotation rather than broad panic. Overall market breadth remained near neutral, suggesting the session was more consolidation after recent gains than a directional breakdown.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市5月18日小幅收跌，納斯達克下跌0.5%，標普500指數微跌0.1%，主因投資者消化消費數據的不確定性，加上公債殖利率略微上揚，壓抑了成長股的買氣。科技類股領跌，而防禦性板塊表現相對抗跌，顯示市場呈現資金輪動走勢，而非全面性的避險情緒。整體市場廣度接近中性，這次回調更像是近期漲勢後的正常整理。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A volume surge occurs when a stock trades significantly more shares than its recent average — often 1.5x or more. It signals that large institutional players (funds, banks) may be entering or exiting a position. When price is rising alongside a volume surge, it confirms the move has real buying conviction behind it rather than just drifting up on thin trading.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 成交量急增是指某支股票的成交量遠超近期均值（通常達1.5倍以上），這往往意味著大型機構投資者（如基金、銀行）正在積極買入或賣出。當股價上漲的同時伴隨成交量放大，代表這波漲勢具有真實的買盤支撐，而非在清淡交易中自然漂升，信號可信度更高。
